1210 Entering fields of sluch ice, in log.
1420 Over log
2140 In log, Vessel encountering considerable ice but making good headway.
Mid to 4 AM Passing through detached fields of mush ice in first half. Ice heavier and more closely packed last half.
0500 Passing thru detached fields of ice.
2110 Ran into heavy field of ice Steering various course at varius speeds endeavoring to force way through ice.
2305 Gained cleared water and resumed course
Mid to 4 AM Various courses through closely packed field ice generally northerly direction. Making little way.
4AM to 8PM Steering various courses, making good a course of about 3 psc thru field ice, various speeeds.
8AM to Merid. Steering various courses through heavy ice, making good a course of about 10 psc.
Merid to 4PM Steering various courses through leads, working very slowly through fields
4PM to 6PM Vessel caught between ice fields and working to bells to enter lead three ship lengths to eastward.
6PM to 8PM Vessel caught in ice field, working engines various speeds in endeavor to loosen hold. Open lead to Eastward starting one ship's length ahead.
8PM to Mid Steering various courses at various speeds in an endeavor to force way through ice. Exploded two charges of black powder attempting to break up ice but met with little result.
Note: Sledge Id LTan brg 316T dist 12.5 mi

Ice_Log: Mid to 4AM Vessel caught in heavy field ice. Ice moving NWly and closing up leads. Various courses and speeds; attempting to force vessel through to main lead ahead. Made about five ships lengths.
4AM to 8AM On various courses + speeds succeeded in working approximately 3.5 mi to Eastward thru heavy field ice.
8AM to Merid. Steering various courses at various speeds attempting to force passage through ice. Making but little progress.
1300 Unable to make any progress; the leads ahead having closed. Stopped.
4PM to 6PM Went ahead thru lead for a distance of six hundred yards when progress was blocked by heavy ice. Vessel drifting inice to westward 1/4 mile an hour.
6PM to 8PM On various courses and speeds made about 1 mi to Eastward.

8PM to Mid Steering various courses attempting to work ship through ice. 2025 Found it impossible to make headway and stopped engines.Ship drifting to the westward with the ice at the rate of about 1.5 mph.
Mid to 4AM Vessel fast in ice drifting slowly to westward.
4AM to 8PM By use of kedge anchors working vessel around to head to Eastward so as to follow a lead thru the ice.
8AM to Merid Working vessel around with kedge anchor and engine.
1010 Struck a lead and steered various courses at various speeds through ice. Making good a course to the NE
Merid to 4PM Making good way through various leads making good course to ENE.
4PM to 6PM standing ~~~ easterly courses thru leads for Nome.
1720 Made fast with kedges to shore ice off Nome.
8AM to Merid Ice between the ship and shore showing signs of breaking up.
1430 Ice in motion.
1500 Unmoored from ice, underway for holding; sound clear of ice fields, various courses.
4PM to 6PM Standing various courses thru open water between inshore ice and the beach for anchorage near Nome.
